isc.criterion: Exports an LRUCache class with get/set/has/delete methods
Evicts the least-recently-used entry when capacity is exceeded
isc.evidence: lru.ts set(): deletes map.keys().next().value when size > capacity

isc.criterion: get() refreshes the recency of the accessed key
isc.evidence: lru.ts get(): delete-then-set moves the key to most-recent position

isc.criterion: Tests cover eviction order and recency refresh

summary: Idiomatic Map-backed LRU with correct recency refresh, capacity guard, and targeted tests. Just shy of reference.
